rulings.Case Title: MAGCO DRILLING, INC. VS. NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 14, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT NATOMA FAMILY HOUSING, L.P., A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, ST. JOSEPH'S FAMILY ASSOCIATES, L.P's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES DENIED per CCP 2033.420 (b)(1). See Plaintiff's responses to the Requests at issue and Wimberly v. Derby Cycle Corp. (1997) 56 Cal.App.4th 618, American Federation of State v. Metropolitan Water Dist. (2005) 126 Cal.App.4th 247. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Chin Chang, Elaine Liu, Rico Huo, Fei Xu'S Motion To Enforce Portion Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 14, 2017, line 2. Defendant Chin Chang, Elaine Liu, Rico Huo, Fei Xu'S Motion To Enforce Portion Of Settlement Agreement DENIED. CCP 664.6 is not a proper mechanism for the remedy sought by the moving party per the terms of the Settlement Agreement. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBIN WILSON VS. JUDITH A BOLTER ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 14, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF ROBIN WILSON Plaintiff Robin Wilsons Motion To Enjoin Foreclosure Sale Continued to April 25, 2017 to be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHAN CHAN VS. HOWARD J. LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order To Correct February 8, 2017 Court Order And Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 14, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT HOWARD LEWIS' Motion For An Order To Correct February 8, 2017 Court Order And Motion continued to May 1, 2017 on Court's own motion and per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)
